        <h3>How do I play?</h3>
        <div class="p">
          Find words by <strong>connecting letters</strong> in any direction.
        </div>
        <div class="p">
          Squares fade out once you find all the words using them. Find all the
          words to clear the board!
        </div>
        <div class="p narrow">
          <strong>
            Tap the
            <a href="#" class="wordListBtn" data-button="about-wordList">word count</a>
          </strong>
          to see which words you've found and how long the remaining words are.
        </div>
        <div class="p">
          <strong>Capitalized</strong> or <strong>hyphenated</strong> words
          usually aren't in our word list.
        </div>
        <div class="p">
          If it helps, you can <strong>rotate the board</strong> with the rotate
          <svg class="inline-icon"><use href="#icon-rotate-right"></use></svg>
          icon for another perspective.
        </div>
        <h3>What's the progress bar?</h3>
        <div class="p">
          Longer words are worth more points, bringing you closer to unlocking
          the next <strong>perk</strong>.
        </div>
        <div class="p">
          <ul>
            <li>
              When you reach the first star
              <svg class="inline-icon" role="img">
                <use href="#icon-star" fill="var(--secondary)"></use>
              </svg>,
              tiles show <strong>how many words start with them</strong>.
            </li>
            <li>
              The second star
              <svg class="inline-icon"><use href="#icon-star" fill="var(--secondary)"></use></svg>
              reveals <strong>how many words use each tile</strong>.
            </li>
            <li>
              Get to the third
              <svg class="inline-icon"><use href="#icon-star" fill="var(--secondary)"></use></svg>
              to unlock <strong>hints</strong> in the word list.
            </li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <div class="p">
          The globe icon
          <svg class="inline-icon"><use href="#icon-globe"></use></svg>
          represents the average of everyone's score so far. Try to beat it!
        </div>
        <h3>When does the next puzzle come out?</h3>
        <div class="p">
          New puzzles come out each day at
          <span class="newPuzzleTimeWithPeriod">3am US Pacific time.</span>
        </div>
        <div class="p">
          Monday puzzles are the easiest; Fridays are the hardest.
          Saturday puzzles have fun twists, and Sundays have tons of words.
        </div>
        <div class="p">
          Each day also brings a new 3x3
          <a href="https://squaredle.app/xp" id="aboutXp">Express</a>
          puzzle.
        </div>
        <h3>Can I use a physical keyboard?</h3>
        <div class="p">
          Yes! Type out the letters, then press <<code>Enter</code>> to
          submit the word. Use <<code>Backspace</code>> to delete a letter.
          The <<code>Space bar</code>> cycles between squares with
          the same letter.
        </div>
        <h3>What's a bonus word?</h3>
        <div class="p">
          Obscure, archaic, and (some) slang words are "bonus" words — they're
          not part of your score, but they show up as "+1" next to the word
          count. The leaderboard
          <svg class="inline-icon"><use href="#icon-chart"></use></svg>
          shows who's found the most bonus words.
          <a href="#" id="aboutBonusWords">More about bonus words</a>
